title: 1 Flower Pillow, Throw Pillow for Bedroom and Living Room, Cute Floor Cushion for Sofa and Floor Seating, 37cm Daisy Flower Cushion with PP Cotton Filling, 260g
features: Charming Daisy Design: This white flower pillow features a delightful daisy shape with eight petals, adding a touch of elegance and style to any room; Its cute and decorative appearance makes it a perfect addition to preppy room decor.

Soft and Comfortable: Made with PP cotton filling, this throw pillow offers a plush and cozy feel; The lightweight design ensures easy portability, making it ideal for use on sofas, chairs, or the floor.

Versatile Use: Suitable for various settings, including bedrooms, living rooms, and floor seating areas; This flower cushion can be used as a decorative pillow, floor mat, or seat cushion, enhancing both comfort and aesthetics.

Compact and Lightweight: Measuring 37cm in diameter and weighing only 260g, this floor cushion is easy to move and store; Its compact size makes it a great choice for small spaces or as a travel companion.
Easy Maintenance: Designed for convenience, this cute pillow is easy to clean and maintain; Its durable construction ensures long-lasting use, making it a practical and stylish choice for any home.
